RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0001 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Hana Mensah Date of Birth: 19/12/1975 SSN (tokenized): TKN-912855 Annual Income: $120,000 Employer: Umbrella Co Loan Amount: $48,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Leeds Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN62899AL Nissan Elantra 2016 Hybrid CPO 19,000 VIN70415AL Ford Model 3 2021 EV CPO 50,000 Authorized Signature: Hana Mensah
